title: Wave4 控件回执:select/multiselect/confirm/text 后打平铺无沟槽 `✓ 已选/已设置 · X` 行 + 收紧提问文案
description: Add a flat (gutter-free) 回执 line after each clack prompt resolves, WITHOUT wrapping or replacing the clack controls (C-006). After select/multiselect → `✓ 已选 · <label(s)>`; after confirm Yes → `✓ <action>`, No → `x <action 取消>` (朱红); after text → `✓ 已设置 · <value>`. Tighten the prompt message/option copy where it leaks jargon. The receipt line uses the existing theme symbol (✓/x) + paint, printed gutter-free (no `│`).
action: Add a small helper (e.g. in install/theme-clack.ts or a new tui/prompt-receipt.ts) `promptReceipt(kind, value)` returning a gutter-free line: select/multiselect/text → `${symbol.ok} ${t('cli.prompt.receipt.selected'|'cli.prompt.receipt.set')} · ${value}`; confirm-no → `${symbol.error} ${paint.error(t('cli.prompt.receipt.cancelled'))}`. Call it at each prompt call site that currently leaves a bare clack block: the install wizard (install-wizard.ts), uninstall wizard multiselect/confirm (uninstall.ts createDefaultUninstallWizardAdapter + confirmDestructive), and config edit (config.ts select/text ~line 367,467). Add the receipt i18n keys to both locales. Do NOT import or restyle the clack control itself.

criteria: A promptReceipt helper exists and is gutter-free (grep the helper; it contains NO `│` literal and uses symbol.ok / symbol.error from the theme)
en.ts AND zh-CN.ts both define 'cli.prompt.receipt.selected', 'cli.prompt.receipt.set', 'cli.prompt.receipt.cancelled' (grep each in both files)
The clack controls remain native — grep confirms NO new wrapper around select/multiselect/confirm/text (theme-clack.ts still wraps CONTEXT only; C-006 comment intact)
[UI-observable] selecting an option in `fabric config` prints a flat `✓ 已设置 · <value>` line (no `│` gutter) after the clack control closes
[UI-observable] cancelling a confirm prints a flat red `x <…取消>` line, not a bare clack outro
pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test exits 0 (locale parity) && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test exits 0 && pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit exits 0
convergence.verification: grep the receipt keys in both locales; run config/uninstall wizard tests; eyeball a `fabric config` edit to see the gutter-free ✓ receipt.
convergence.definition_of_done: Every interactive prompt leaves a single flat ✓/x receipt line after it closes, clack controls stay native and unwrapped, and the receipt copy is localized in both locales.

files.change: Add promptReceipt(kind:'selected'|'set'|'cancelled', value?) → gutter-free `${symbol.ok|symbol.error} ${t(...)} · ${value}` line. CONTEXT-only scope preserved; PROMPT controls not wrapped.
After a successful select/text edit, print promptReceipt('set', value).
After the multiselect resolves print promptReceipt('selected', labels); on confirm Yes/No print the ✓/x receipt.
Print promptReceipt after each resolved prompt.
Add the SAME keys: 已选 / 已设置 / 已取消.

implementation: Add the promptReceipt helper + receipt i18n keys to both locales.
Wire promptReceipt into config edit, uninstall wizard + confirmDestructive, install wizard call sites.
Leave all clack control calls native (do not wrap).

reference.pattern: theme-clack.ts CONTEXT-only wrapping + symbol.ok/symbol.error from theme; uninstall.ts already prints summaries after the wizard

rationale.chosen_approach: A single gutter-free receipt helper called at each prompt site keeps clack native (C-006) while giving the flat ✓ acknowledgement the spec mandates.
decision_factors: spec §2 wants a留白 ✓ 回执 after each control

risks: Calling promptReceipt on a cancelled prompt must use the cancel branch (x), not the success branch.
